title: Mechanical Equation GUI pack
description: Mechanical Equation GUI is full of mechanical style themes, each functional block has a unique texture.
body:
# Mechanical Equation GUI pack
![Mechanical Equation GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e51a3665cee36fda7ed66971c06a715a8f3905c5.png)
 **Mechanical Equation GUI**
is full of mechanical style themes, each functional block has a unique texture.Mechanical Equation GUI is the coolest and best GUI **( at least I think so ).**
I try my best to finish it and make it more perfect, perfect and popular.
I hope you like it.

**To view _Mechanical Equation GUI pack_ on curseforge, click [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mechanical-equation-gui-pack).**

### **_Just keep in mind:_**

- **_Make sure to credit, and don't claim Mechanical Equation GUI as your own creation._**
- **_You may create or edit assets in the pack for compatibility with other mod's UIs._**
- **_This collection of resource pack styles is not original, but comes from HokeyBones on X. I like this style and have modified it to adapt it to Minecraft._**
